title: Conophytum elishae
taxonomy: Conophytum elishae is classified in the plant kingdom as belonging to the family Aizoaceae. This family consists of succulents that are commonly found in South Africa. Conophytum elishae is further classified as a genus within the family, specifically Conophytum, which includes a large group of small succulent plants. The species Conophytum elishae is also known as Elisha's buttons, named after its unique appearance. Conophytum elishae is native to South Africa, where it grows in a specific, arid region.
